name: predicted-vs-oracle-wide-10seed
description: 10 seeds, wide-FOV 15^3 goal-vector. Wide-FOV variant of predicted-vs-oracle-10seed: same PPO + curriculum config, but the goal-vector network is the hierarchical 15^3 / strides=[1,2,4] model trained on Theia (val. cosine 0.9968). 10 replicates tighten 95% CIs vs. the 3-seed predicted-vs-oracle-wide run, to firm up or invalidate the wide-FOV regression observed on Lateral-Ventricle.
